nodes.context: Swedish Somali organised crime syndicate originating from Rinkeby, Stockholm, involved in drug trade and murders.
Another Swedish Somali criminal organization originating from Rinkeby, rival of Dödspatrullen.

edges.evidence_quote: Dödspatrullen has been in a gang war with Shottaz, another Swedish Somali criminal organization originating from Rinkeby, since 2015.
edges.context: Dödspatrullen and Shottaz have been in a gang war since 2015, resulting in multiple deaths.
